_comment: Source URLs for each palegis fixture, used by scripts/refetch-fixtures.py. Filenames are the test contract — rename here AND in tests/test_palegis.py together.

senate-roster.html.purpose: parse_roster — Senate cards (data-name, data-district, data-party, data-county, data-leadership)

senate-bio-pittman.html.purpose: enrich_from_bio — Capitol office, phone, email JS block, committees + role badges (Chair, Ex-Officio)

house-bio-mcclinton.html.purpose: enrich_from_bio — House Speaker bio (committee badges in House layout)

senate-committee-index.html.purpose: parse_committee_index — list of Senate committees with palegis IDs and slugs

senate-committee-ere.html.purpose: parse_committee_detail — chair/min-chair extraction (uses non-breaking space in 'Minority Chair' badge), active bills

bill-sb970.html.purpose: parse_bill_detail — bill number from <title>, Memo Subject vs Short Title, last action with abbreviated month + non-breaking space, prime sponsor link in 'senator-firstname-lastname' long form
